subcodes.first_line: The seekers are in Haifa whilst the Sought One dwelleth in 'Akká. Glorified be your Lord, the Most Exalted! The Root of the Tree is in 'Akká and its Branch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طالبان در حیفا و مطلوب در عکا سبحان ربکم الاعلی اصل السدره فی العکا و فرعها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
